name: openperps-oss
description: OpenPerps OSS: SDK-first perpetual-futures infrastructure for Solana apps.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @opp-oss/sdk && npm run build -w @opp-oss/react && npm run build -w @opp-oss/keeper
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @opp-oss/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @opp-oss/sdk && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
